title: Quantum Quotient — Online Quiz 2024
subtitle: To encourage interest and test knowledge in the field of optics and photonics through an engaging and competitive online quiz format.
description: BVP OPTICA organized Quantum Quotient as an online quiz competition held on 11th February 2024. The quiz consisted of a single round featuring 20 challenging questions that required concise single-word answers, testing participants’ understanding of core concepts in optics and photonics.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Questions based on light wave behaviour, optical materials, and photonics applications
Concept-focused questions testing real understanding rather than rote learning
Certificates provided to participants and winners
